data.title: Full test suite triggered by high-centrality files records as failed with no specific failing tests
data.description: When record-test-status.sh runs the full test suite (triggered by high-centrality files like plugin.json), the suite sometimes records as failed with an empty failed_tests field. This appears to be a timeout issue — the full suite of ~500 tests exceeds the tool timeout ceiling. The test gate then blocks commits even though no specific test failed. This blocked the version bump commit for eb00-efd0.
